critical_code_review_comments: DienstenPage.jsx correctly structured with services and niches objects - clean data architecture
All 14 niches have consistent structure: icon, color, title (nl/en), subtitle (nl/en), description (nl/en), benefits (nl/en), examples (nl/en)
Background image URL correctly set as BG_IMAGE constant
Navigation dropdown in LandingPage.jsx includes top niches with dividers for visual separation
Footer correctly updated with 'WEBSITES VOOR' column showing key niches + 'Meer' link
